error.choose_one_source: Choose either a New Message entry or manual alias/chat_id input, not both.
error.no_chat_selected: Select a New Message entry or manually enter both alias and chat_id.
error.manual_fields_required: Manual mode requires both alias and chat_id.

add_chat.title: Add a chat
add_chat.description: Select a chat from New Messages, or manually enter an alias and chat_id.

configure_chat.title: Configure a chat
configure_chat.description: Name of chatroom will be used to identify the chatroom

remove_chat.title: Remove a chat
remove_chat.description: Select a name of chatroom to remove
